title: Mova Vacuum Plugin
description: Matterbridge plugin for Mova vacuum cleaners with Matter 1.4 support

username.description: Mova account email or phone number

suctionLevel.description: Suction level used when starting cleaning from Matter

vacuumAndMopMode.description: What Apple Home's Vacuum & Mop mode should start on MOVA

unregisterOnShutdown.description: Unregister devices when plugin shuts down (development only)
